overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, showing a Space Marine in blue power armor navigating through the ruined gothic Temple of Thasseraan. The character moves through rubble-strewn exteriors and dark corridors, interacts with weapon caches and dataslates, and engages in combat with Tyranid enemies in a grand cathedral hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined temple exterior with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: jogging through rubble-strewn ruins toward the temple entrance, navigating around broken pillars and metal debris

entered.detail: massive crumbling gothic structures with pointed arches and broken spires
scattered stones, metal fragments, and debris covering the ground
glowing purple warp energy visible in the distance beyond the ruins
collapsed stone columns with ornate gothic detailing

segments.scene_description: The Space Marine jogs through the ruined exterior of the Temple of Thasseraan, navigating over rubble and debris. Gothic architecture surrounds the area with a purple energy glow visible in the distance, and broken pillars line the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark rubble-filled corridor with lore items

events.description: interacts with dataslate console to collect encrypted audio log
picks up Melta Bomb from the ground

agents.ego_description: moving through the dark corridor and interacting with a dataslate console and weapon pickup on the ground

entered.detail: dark metal bulkheads with gothic rivet patterns and warning stripes
small terminal with glowing green interface displaying encrypted data
explosive device lying on the ground with visible casing

segments.scene_description: Moving into a darker enclosed corridor with metal walls, the Space Marine discovers a dataslate console containing encrypted audio logs and picks up a Melta Bomb from the debris-strewn floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapon cache room with purple warp energy

events.description: approaches and interacts with the weapon cache terminal surrounded by purple energy
acquires Power Sword and Bolt Carbine from the weapon cache

agents.ego_description: approaching the weapon cache terminal surrounded by crackling purple energy and selecting new weapons from the display

notable_agents.action: allied Space Marine standing guard near the weapon cache terminal

entered.detail: tall gothic-tech terminal with weapon displays and glowing interfaces
crackling purple energy tendrils emanating from behind the terminal
large metal pipes running vertically along the wall

segments.scene_description: The Space Marine enters a chamber containing a weapon cache terminal surrounded by crackling purple warp energy. An allied Space Marine stands guard as the player interacts with the terminal to acquire a Power Sword and Bolt Carbine.

events.description: interacts with door control panel to open the bulkhead door
bulkhead door opens revealing the cathedral hall beyond

agents.ego_description: moving to the door control panel and opening the bulkhead door to proceed deeper into the temple complex

entered.detail: large heavy metal door with hydraulic mechanisms and gothic detailing
wall-mounted panel with glowing green interface for door operation

segments.scene_description: Proceeding through a metal corridor, the Space Marine interacts with a door control panel to open a large bulkhead door, transitioning into a grand cathedral hall visible through the opening doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral hall with sandbag barricades

events.description: engages Tyranid enemies in melee combat within the cathedral hall

agents.ego_description: charging into combat against multiple Tyranid creatures in the large hall, engaging with melee attacks

notable_agents.action: Tyranid warrior charging toward the player with claws extended
Tyranid creature leaping over sandbags to attack

entered.detail: massive ornate stone pillars supporting the high vaulted ceiling
stacked sandbags forming defensive positions along the sides
large gothic lighting fixture hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The Space Marine enters a vast cathedral hall with towering gothic pillars and sandbag barricades, immediately engaging in fierce melee combat with charging Tyranid enemies. The ornate chandelier hangs above as the battle erupts in the torch-lit chamber.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the ruined exterior of the Temple of Thasseraan into a vast, battle-torn cathedral hall. It begins with a Space Marine jogging through rubble and broken gothic pillars under a distant purple glow before transitioning into a dark, enclosed metal corridor to retrieve a dataslate and a Melta Bomb. The path then opens into a chamber crackling with purple warp energy, where the camera follows the Marine as he acquires a Power Sword and Bolt Carbine from a weapon cache terminal. After proceeding through another metal corridor and activating a bulkhead door, the scene expands into a grand cathedral hall characterized by towering pillars and torch-lit sandbag barricades. The movement finally culminates in a sudden eruption of melee combat as the Marine engages charging Tyranid enemies beneath a massive ornate chandelier.
